description.value: Price 75,315 gp; Slot none; CL 11th; Weight 4 lbs.; Aura moderate abjuration, transmutation, and necromancy EFFECTS This +2 cruel furyborn scimitar is decorated with images of shriveled vines and wilted flowers along its blade. Three times per day as an immediate action after dealing damage to a creature, the wielder can cause the blighted plant life depicted on the blade to animate, embedding thorny vines in the creatureâs wounds. The creeping, twisting vines cause the creature to become entangled for 1d4 rounds, and it is nauseated by the pain while the entangled condition persists. A successful DC 22 Fortitude saving throw negates the nauseated condition. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 37,815 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells cause fear, death knell, rage, sickening entanglement
